ddls:
CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the session is held */,
  "class_size" TEXT /* Maximum number of students that can attend the session */,
  "class_time" TEXT /* Time slot of the training session */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor leading the session */,
  "availability" TEXT /* Availability status of the session (e.g., Space Available, Fully Booked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the training session */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the training session (e.g., Technical, Soft Skills) */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisites for attending the training session */,
  "materials_required" TEXT /* Materials required for the training session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  "room_number" TEXT /* Room number at the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "instructor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the instructor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the instructor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the instructor belongs to */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the instructor */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the instructor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being registered for */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee registering for the session */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the employee registered for the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waitlists" (
  "waitlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waitlist entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being waitlisted for */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being waitlisted */,
  "waitlist_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was added to the waitlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waitlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_waitlists_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being attended */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee attending the session */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date the employee attended the session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluations" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session being evaluated */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee evaluating the session */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the employee submitted the evaluation */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the training session (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee earning the certification */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
